svg.title: Minimum time to collect all apples in a larger tree
svg.desc: Post-order subtree DP on a 14-node tree rooted at node 0, with a deep chain and a dead branch, propagating a boolean "subtree contains an apple" upward and summing 2 times the edges kept, ending with the minimum total time.
svg.text: tree rooted at 0, 14 nodes — amber nodes have an apple
child 10 (apple, +0+2) + child 11 (no apple, skip); → time=2, hasApple=True
child 6 (apple, +2+2) + child 7 (apple, +0+2) + child 8 (no apple, skip); → time=6,
